description: Source code for a React-based calculator frontend component implementing arithmetic operations, input handling, display updates, and user interactions.

methods.name: handleClear
methods.description: Resets the calculator to its initial state.

methods.name: handleBackspace
methods.description: Removes the last character from the current display value or resets if in error state.

methods.name: handleDigit
methods.description: Appends a digit to the current display, handling leading zeros and maximum length.

methods.name: handleDecimal
methods.description: Appends a decimal point to the display if not already present.

methods.name: compute
methods.description: Performs arithmetic operations (+, -, *, /), handling division by zero.

methods.name: formatResult
methods.description: Formats the numerical result for display, limiting decimal places and trimming zeros.

methods.name: handleOperator
methods.description: Sets or computes intermediate result when an operator button is pressed.

methods.name: handleEquals
methods.description: Computes the final result when '=' is pressed.

methods.name: getOpSymbol
methods.description: Returns display symbol for an operator.

methods.name: handleButtonClick
methods.description: Handles clicks on calculator buttons, delegating to appropriate functions.
